title: BEM-1147 managed consumer
objective:
Create file governance/runners/managed_channel_consumer.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

SCHEMA_PATH = Path("governance/channels/managed_channel_schema.json")


def load_schema():
    return json.loads(SCHEMA_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def validate_message(message):
    schema = load_schema()
    required = set(schema.get("message_required_fields", []))
    missing = sorted(required - set(message))
    if missing:
        return False, [f"missing fields: {missing}"]
    proof_policy = message.get("proof_policy", {})
    errors = []
    if proof_policy.get("contains_secret") is True:
        errors.append("message contains secret")
    if proof_policy.get("template_only") is True and proof_policy.get("claims_release_proof") is True:
        errors.append("template cannot claim release proof")
    return not errors, errors


def consume(message_path):
    message = json.loads(Path(message_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    ok, errors = validate_message(message)
    return {"ok": ok, "errors": errors, "message_id": message.get("message_id")}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    if len(sys.argv) != 2:
        print("usage: managed_channel_consumer.py <message.json>")
        raise SystemExit(2)
    result = consume(sys.argv[1])
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result["ok"] else 1)
